index.title: Umhumushi Wezinsizakusebenza
index.description: I-Resource Translator ivula izicelo zokudonsa ezihunyushwe ngomshini zamafayela akho emithombo kunoma iyiphi i-repo, kunoma iyiphi ifomethi - inikwe amandla yi-Azure AI Translator, i-AWS Translate, noma i-Google Cloud Translation.
index.socialTitle: Umhumushi Wezinsizakusebenza - humusha amafayela omthombo ngokuzenzakalelayo
index.badge: v3.0 - Azure, AWS & Google providers, Node 24, repo config
index.lede: Umhumushi wemithombo uvula izicelo zokudonsa ezihunyushwe ngomshini zamafayela akho emithombo usebenzisa i-Azure, i-AWS, noma i-Google - isenzo esisodwa esihlangene, umhlinzeki oyedwa ngokugijima ngakunye, ama-SDK asemthethweni ngaphansi kwe-hood.
index.workflowTitle: Ukuhumusha njengomsebenzi wokusebenza, hhayi umsebenzi womsebenzi.
index.workflowBody: Phonsa isenzo ku-CI yakho ekhona, uyikhombe ku-Azure, AWS, noma ku-Google, bese uvumele i-repo yakho ikhulume zonke izilimi ozihlosile.

formats.title: Amafomethi wefayela ayisithupha
formats.body: Uhambo lokubuya nokubuya {resx}, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini}, no-{restext} ngokufometha okuzinzile kwe-byte.

config.title: Ukumiselwa kwezinga le-Repo
config.body: Phonsa ifayela le-{configPath} ukufaka ama-globs, ama-glossaries, kanye nezigaba Zomhumushi Ngokwezifiso.

glossary.title: I-Glossary-aware
glossary.body: Khiya amagama womkhiqizo nemigomo yomkhiqizo nge-regex ehlakaniphile ye-word-boundary ephatha {cpp}, {dotnet}, nabangane.

dryRun.title: I-Dry-run + soft-fail
dryRun.body: Buka kuqala izinguqulo ngaphandle kokubhala amafayela, noma uveze wonke amaphutha njengesixwayiso ngenkathi uphinda.

sdk.title: I-Azure, i-AWS ne-Google
sdk.body: Khetha umhlinzeki oyedwa ngokugijima ngakunye. Ngayinye iqhutshwa yi-SDK yayo esemthethweni ({azureSdk}, {awsSdk}, {googleSdk}) ngokuzama kabusha okuzenzakalelayo ku-{statusCodes} - ayikho i-HTTP esongwe ngesandla. {esbuild}-bundled, audit-clean.

workflowPreview.body: Izimfihlo ezintathu, imigqa emine, futhi i-repo yakho ikhuluma izilimi eziningi ekucindezeleni okulandelayo.

cta.title: Ukulungele ukungena endaweni ku-autopilot?
cta.body: Ukhiye owodwa womhlinzeki - i-Azure, i-AWS, noma i-Google - nefayela elilodwa lokuhamba komsebenzi. Umhumushi wemithombo uphatha okusele.

getting-started.title: Ukuqala
getting-started.heroLede: Engeza ifayela lokuhamba komsebenzi, khetha umhlinzeki wakho wokuhumusha - i-Azure, i-AWS, noma i-Google - futhi isenzo skena i-repo yamafayela emithombo yolimi lomthombo futhi sikhipha izingane zakubo ezihunyushiwe.

provider.title: Khetha umhlinzeki wokuhumusha
provider.body: Isenzo sisebenza nge-{azure}, i-{aws}, ne-{google} ngemuva kwendawo eyodwa ye-API ebumbene. Khetha umhlinzeki oyedwa nge-run ngayinye ngokufakwa kwe-{provider} - ukuhamba komsebenzi kuziphatha ngendlela efanayo kungakhathalekile ukuthi umhlinzeki; Iziqinisekiso kuphela ziyahlukahlaka. Bheka {providersLink} ukuze uthole ukuqhathanisa okuphelele.

configure.title: Engeza iziqinisekiso kanye nomsebenzi wokuhamba komsebenzi
configure.body: Gcina iziqinisekiso zomhlinzeki wakho njengezimfihlo ze-GitHub, bese udala {workflowPath}. Khetha umhlinzeki wakho ngezansi ukusetha kwakhe okuqondile - konke ukuhamba komsebenzi kuyafana.

azure.note: I-Azure ingumhlinzeki ozenzakalelayo, ngakho-ke {provider} kungashiywa. Hlinzeka umthombo we-Azure AI Translator ku-portal ye-Azure, bese ugcine iziqinisekiso zayo:

aws.note: Hlela {provider} ku-{providerValue}. Khetha i-OIDC nge-{configureAwsCredentials} ukuze kungabikho zimfihlo ezihlala isikhathi eside ezigcinwayo - ukuthunyelwa kwesinyathelo {awsRegionEnv} kuwe. Ukusebenzisa okhiye be-static esikhundleni, gcina:
aws.regionNote: Isifunda siyadingeka ngaso sonke isikhathi — sibeke nge-{awsRegion} noma i-{awsRegionEnv} imvelo eguquguqukayo.

google.note: Hlela {provider} ku-{providerValue}. Qinisekisa ngesitifiketi se-JSON se-akhawunti yesevisi noma ukhiye we-API - nikeza eyodwa ngqo:
google.projectNote: I-{googleProjectId} yokuzikhethela ithathwa kusuka ku-credential uma ishiyiwe.

resource.title: Yenza ifayela lomthombo
resource.body: Amafayela emithombo asebenzisa isivumelwano {namingConvention}. Isibonelo, {sourceFile} iba {frFile}, {deFile}, njll ngemuva kokugijima.

output.title: Hlola okukhiphayo
output.body: Lapho ukuhamba komsebenzi sekuphelile, isenzo siveza imiphumela emithathu ongayifaka encazelweni ye-PR: {summaryTitle}, {summaryDetails}, ne-{hasNewTranslations}. Ibuye ibhale isifinyezo se-Markdown ekhasini lomsebenzi nge-{coreSummary}.

nextSteps.title: Izinyathelo ezilandelayo
nextSteps.providers: Qhathanisa wonke umhlinzeki kanye neziqinisekiso zakhe eceleni.
nextSteps.recipes: Bheka izindlela zokupheka zama-monorepos, ama-glossaries angokwezifiso, nezigaba ze-Custom Translator.

providers.title: Abahlinzeki bokuhumusha
providers.lede: Khetha umhlinzeki oyedwa wokuhumusha nge-run ngayinye - i-Azure AI Translator, i-AWS Translate, noma i-Google Cloud Translation - ngemuva kwendawo eyodwa, ehlanganisiwe ye-API. Umhumushi uziphatha ngendlela efanayo kungakhathalekile ukuthi umhlinzeki; Iziqinisekiso kuphela ziyahlukahlaka.
providers.backwardCompatible: Ukuhambisana ngokuphelele: {provider} okuzenzakalelayo ku-{azure}, ngakho-ke ukuhamba komsebenzi okukhona kwe-Azure kuyaqhubeka kusebenza kungashintshiwe - akukho ukuhlelwa okudingekayo.

selecting.title: Ukukhetha umhlinzeki
selecting.body: Hlela okokufaka {provider} ku-{azure} (okumisiwe), {aws}, noma {google}, bese unikeze iziqinisekiso zalowo mnikezeli. Umhlinzeki oyedwa kuphela osetshenziswa ngocingo ngalunye lwesenzo; isenzo sidlulisela ngokucacile ku-SDK ehambisanayo ngemuva kwefektri.

aws.name: Ukuhumusha kwe-AWS
aws.credentials: I-OIDC / uchungechunge oluzenzakalelayo, noma i-awsAccessKeyId + awsSecretAccessKey; awsRegion

azure.title: Umhumushi we-Azure AI (okuzenzakalelayo)
azure.body: Umhlinzeki ozenzakalelayo. Hlinzeka ngomthombo we-Azure AI Translator bese udlulisa {subscriptionKey}, {endpoint}, futhi ngokuzikhethela {region}. Lesi yisimo esifanayo esivele sisetshenziswa yi-Excel.

aws.title: Ukuhumusha kwe-AWS
aws.body: Sebenzisa {sdk}. Khetha i-OIDC nge-{configureAwsCredentials} ukuze kungabikho zimfihlo ezihlala isikhathi eside ezigcinwayo - isenzo sifunda uchungechunge lweziqinisekiso ezizenzakalelayo ze-AWS SDK. Ngenye indlela, dlulisa {awsAccessKeyId} bese {awsSecretAccessKey} ngokucacile. Isifunda ngaso sonke isikhathi siyadingeka, nge-{awsRegion} noma {awsRegionEnv} imvelo eguquguqukayo.
aws.keysNote: Ukusebenzisa okhiye be-static esikhundleni se-OIDC, yehlisa isinyathelo {configureAwsCredentials} bese udlulisa {awsAccessKeyId} / {awsSecretAccessKey} (nge-{secrets}) kanye ne-{awsRegion}.

google.title: Ukuhumusha kwe-Google Cloud
google.body: Sebenzisa {sdk} (v2). Qinisekisa ngokhiye we-API ({googleApiKey}) noma isitifiketi se-akhawunti yesevisi ye-JSON ({googleCredentials}). Nikeza eyodwa ngqo; I-{googleProjectId} yokuzikhethela ithathwa kusuka ku-credential uma ishiyiwe.

mapping.title: Imephu ye-Intent-specifier
mapping.body: Ama-specifiers aqondene nomhlinzeki akhiqizwa lapho kukhona khona okulingana nakho. Konke okunye kubuyela emuva kokuphazamiseka okunengqondo ukuze ukuziphatha kuhlala kungaguquguquki.
mapping.caption: Imephu ye-Intent-specifier kuwo wonke abahlinzeki

locales.title: Amakhodi endawo ahlukile kumnikezeli ngamunye
locales.body: Umhlinzeki ngamunye usebenzisa amakhodi akhe endawo (isibonelo isiShayina esenziwe lula {azureCode} ku-Azure, {awsCode} ku-AWS, ne-{googleCode} ku-Google). Amakhodi adlula njengoba enjalo futhi ashayela amagama amafayela okukhiphayo, ngakho-ke khetha amanani {toLocales} umhlinzeki wakho okhethiwe asekela.

configuration.title: Ukumiswa
configuration.lede: Veza okuzenzakalelayo kanye kufayela lokumiswa kwendawo yokugcina futhi uvumele yonke imisebenzi ithole ifa. Ukufakwa kwesenzo kuhlale kunqoba lapho kokubili kunikezwa.
configuration.intro: Dlulisa umkhondo ngofakelo lwe-{configPath} uma udinga indawo engeyona emisiwe.

fields.sourceLocale: Buyela emuva ekufakweni {sourceLocale} uma kungenzeki. Iphinde idluliselwe ku-Translator njengoba {fromLocale} ngakho-ke izintambo ezimfushane azitholakali ngokuzenzakalelayo.
fields.toLocales: Noma i-array noma intambo ehlukaniswe nge-comma.
fields.includeExclude: Amaphethini we-Glob ahlolwe ngokumelene nezindlela ezihlobene ngokuphelele nendawo yokusebenzela.
fields.glossary: Ukuhumusha kwegama lokuhumusha kudlulile. Word-boundary aware (izibambo {cpp}, {dotnet}).
fields.categoryId: Isigaba se-Azure {customTranslatorLink} - imboni yakho / isizinda (ezomthetho, ezokwelapha, ithoni yokumaketha, njll.). Ithunyelwe njenge-{categoryQuery}.
fields.textType: Okuzenzakalelayo ku-{plain}. Sebenzisa {html} kuphela uma amanani omnyombo wakho equkethe izingcezu zangempela ze-HTML.
fields.profanityAction: Indlela yokuphatha amagama ahlanzekile ekukhiqizeni okuhunyushiwe?
fields.allowFallback: Setha {false} ukwehluleka ukuhumusha uma {categoryId} yakho ingenakho ukuthunyelwa kwendawo okuhlosiwe esikhundleni sokubuyela emuva kumodeli ejwayelekile.
fields.apiVersion: Umhumushi we-REST API version. Okuzenzakalelayo ku-{version}.
fields.maxRetries: Imizamo ephezulu yokuzama kabusha izimpendulo ze-HTTP zesikhashana ({statusCodes}). Okuzenzakalelayo ku-{defaultRetries}. Izingcingo ze-HTTP eziphelele ngesicelo ngasinye {totalCalls}.
fields.retryBackoffMs: I-Cap (ms) kunoma yikuphi ukulala okukodwa kwe-backoff. Okuzenzakalelayo ku-{defaultBackoff}. Isihloko se-{retryAfter} se-Azure sihlonishwa ncamashi lapho sikhona; ngaphandle kwalokho kusetshenziswa i-backoff exponential, efakwe kuleli nani.
fields.protectPlaceholders: Okuzenzakalelayo ku-{true}. Lapho ivuliwe, amathokheni afana ne-{mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} ne-HTML athathelwa indawo ngamathokheni we-sentinel ngaphambi kokuhumusha futhi abuyiselwe ngemuva kwalokho. Khubaza kuphela uma umthombo uqukethe ngamabomu imibhalo emise okwendawo.
fields.customPlaceholderPatterns: Amaphethini we-regex angeziwe (ngaphandle kwama-delimiters) afakwe kusethi ye-placeholder ezenzakalelayo, isib. {angleToken}-syntax yethokheni yangokwezifiso. Ama-regexes angavumelekile awanakwa.
fields.noTranslatePatterns: Amaphethini we-Glob ahambisana nokhiye bezinga le-parser (indlela yamachashazi e-JSON, i-RESX {resxName}, i-PO {poMsgid}, iyunithi ye-XLIFF {xliffId}, ukhiye we-INI / restext). Okhiye abahambisanayo baphonswa esicelweni bese bedlula ngenani labo lomthombo lilondoloziwe.

steps.actionInputs: Isenzo sifunda okokufaka okucacile komsebenzi wokusebenza.
steps.precedence: Kuyo yonke inkambu eyabiwe, okokufaka kunqoba; ngaphandle kwalokho inani le-YAML lisetshenziswa.
steps.validation: Amanani ahlanganisiwe aqinisekisiwe. Ama-enums angaqinisekisiwe (isib. {invalidEnum}) enza isenzo sihluleke ngokushesha ngomyalezo ocacile.

tone.heading: Ithoni kanye nomkhakha ngamagama acacile
tone.body: I-Azure AI Translator v3 API ayinayo inkinobho eyodwa yethoni. Izilungiselelo ezimbili zihlangana ukukunikeza iningi lokulawula okufanayo:
tone.industryBody: sebenzisa {categoryId} ukukhomba isigaba se-Azure {customTranslatorLink} esiqeqeshwe ku-corpus yakho - ezomthetho, ezobuchwepheshe, ezokwelapha, ukumaketha, noma yini enye. Lesi yisigwedlo esinamandla kakhulu sethoni, izwi lomkhiqizo, nesilulumagama.
tone.surfaceBody: Sebenzisa i-{glossaryLink} ukukhiya amagama omkhiqizo nemigomo yomkhiqizo ngezwi, futhi usebenzise i-{profanityAction} ukuhlanza amagama angcolile lapho ubhekise endaweni yezithameli ezincane.

inputs.title: Okokufaka nokukhiphayo
inputs.lede: Konke okufakiwe kwamukelwa kufayela lokuzikhethela le-repo config. Lapho zombili lezi ziqephu zisetshenzisiwe, inkinobho yesenzo iyanqoba.
inputs.configurationIntro: Bheka {configurationLink} ye-schema ye-YAML kanye ne-oda lokulayisha.

items.sourceLocale: Indawo yomthombo (isib. {en}) esetshenziselwa ukuthola amafayela omnyombo afana {sourceGlob}. Ngaphezu kwalokho, idluliselwa kumhlinzeki njengoba {fromLocale}.

providerInputs.heading: Ukukhethwa komnikezeli kanye nezifakazelo
providerInputs.caption: Ukukhethwa komnikezeli kanye nezifakazelo zomthengisi ngamunye
providerInputs.intro: Khetha umhlinzeki oyedwa ngokugijima {provider}. Nikeza kuphela iziqinisekiso zomhlinzeki okhethiwe - bheka umhlahlandlela we-{providersLink} wokuhlela okuphelele.

items.provider: Umhlinzeki wokuhumusha: {azure} (okuzenzakalelayo), {aws}, noma {google}. Umhlinzeki oyedwa kuphela osetshenziswa ngocingo lwesenzo.
items.subscriptionKey: Azure AI Translator subscription key. Kuyadingeka {azure}. Dlula nge-{secrets}.
items.endpoint: I-Azure Translator endpoint URL, isib. {endpointUrl}. Kuyadingeka {azure}.
items.awsAccessKeyId: I-ID yokhiye wokufinyelela we-AWS. Okukhethwa kukho - shiya (nge-{awsSecretAccessKey}) ukusebenzisa uchungechunge lweziqinisekiso ezizenzakalelayo ze-AWS / OIDC. Dlula nge-{secrets}.
items.awsSecretAccessKey: Ukhiye wokufinyelela oyimfihlo we-AWS. Kufanele ihlanganiswe kanye {awsAccessKeyId}. Dlula nge-{secrets}.
items.awsSessionToken: Ithokheni yeseshini ye-AWS yokuzikhethela yeziqinisekiso zesikhashana. Dlula nge-{secrets}.
items.awsRegion: Isifunda se-AWS sensizakalo yokuhumusha (isib. {regionExample}). Kuyadingeka {aws} ngaphandle kokuthi {awsRegionEnv} ibekwe emvelweni.
items.googleApiKey: Ukhiye we-Google Cloud API. Nikeza lokhu NOMA {googleCredentials} {google}. Dlula nge-{secrets}.
items.googleCredentials: Ukhiye we-akhawunti yesevisi ye-Google Cloud njengentambo ye-JSON. Nikeza lokhu NOMA {googleApiKey} {google}. Dlula nge-{secrets}.
items.googleProjectId: I-ID yephrojekthi ye-Google Cloud yokuzikhethela. Ngokuvamile, i-akhawunti ye

items.region: Isifunda semithombo yomhumushi (shiya imithombo yomhlaba wonke).
items.toLocales: Izindawo zokuhumusha Yamukela i-JSON array ({jsonArray}) noma amanani ahlukaniswe ngamakoma.
items.include: Amaphethini we-glob ahlukaniswe yi-Newline; Amafayela ahambisanayo kuphela ahunyushiwe.
items.exclude: Amaphethini we-glob ahlukaniswe yi-Newline; Amafayela afanayo yeqa (asetshenziswe ngemuva kokufaka).
items.configPath: Indlela eya kwifayela lokumiswa kwe-YAML (maqondana nempande yendawo yokusebenzela).
items.dryRun: Uma {true}, sebenzisa ukuhumusha bese ukhipha izifinyezo kodwa ungabhali amafayela.
items.failOnError: Lapho {true}, amaphutha angalindelekile ehluleka isenzo; Lapho {false}, amaphutha ayisixwayiso.

translatorInputs.heading: Azure Translator request inputs
translatorInputs.intro: Lezi zibalazwe ngqo kumapharamitha wombuzo we-Azure AI Translator v3 futhi zisebenza kumhlinzeki we-azure. textType kanye nokuhlambalaza nakho kumephu ku-AWS / Google lapho kukhona okulingana khona (bheka umhlahlandlela wabahlinzeki); ezinye ziyi-Azure kuphela. Ngayinye iyazikhethela; Umhumushi ozenzakalelayo usebenza uma ungasekwanga.
translatorInputs.caption: Azure Translator request inputs

items.categoryId: Azure {customTranslatorLink} category — the industry/domain/tone knob. Zithunyelwe njenge-{categoryQuery}.
items.textType: {plain} noma {html}. Sebenzisa {html} kuphela uma amanani emithombo yakho eyizingcezu zangempela ze-HTML.
items.profanityAction: {noAction}, {marked}, noma {deleted}. Ilawula ukuthi amagama angcolile akhishwa kanjani ekuhumusheni.
items.allowFallback: Uma {false}, Umhumushi ubuyisela iphutha esikhundleni sokubuyela emgudwini ojwayelekile uma {categoryId} yakho ingenakho ukuthunyelwa kwendawo okuhlosiwe.

resilienceInputs.heading: Ukuqina nokuvikelwa kwendawo
resilienceInputs.intro: Lezi okokufaka zilawula ukuthi isenzo siziphatha kanjani lapho uMhumushi enciphisa isicelo sakho nokuthi ivikela kanjani amathokheni we-placeholder afana ne-{mustache} noma i-{indexZero} ekuphazamiseni ngesikhathi sokuhumusha.
resilienceInputs.caption: Ukuqina nokuvikelwa kwendawo

items.maxRetries: Imizamo ephezulu yokuzama kabusha izimpendulo ze-HTTP zesikhashana ({statusCodes}). Inani eliphelele lezingcingo ze-HTTP ngesicelo ngasinye liyi-{totalCalls}.
items.retryBackoffMs: Cap (ngama-milliseconds) kunoma yikuphi ukulala okukodwa kwe-backoff. Isenzo sihlonipha ikhanda lempendulo ye-{retryAfter} ye-Azure ncamashi lapho ikhona; ngaphandle kwalokho isebenzisa i-jittered exponential backoff ehlanganiswe kuleli nani.
items.protectPlaceholders: Lapho {true} (okuzenzakalelayo), abanikazi bezindawo ezifana ne-{mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} ne-HTML zithathelwa indawo ngamathokheni we-sentinel ngaphambi kokuhumusha futhi zibuyiselwe ngemuva kwalokho. Khubaza kuphela uma umthombo wakho uqukethe ngamabomu umbhalo ongokoqobo omise okwe-placeholder okufanele uhunyushelwe.
items.customPlaceholderPatterns: Ama-regexes ahlukaniswe yi-Newline (ngaphandle kwama-delimiters) afakwe kusethi ye-placeholder ezenzakalelayo, isib. {angleToken} ye-syntax yethokheni yangokwezifiso.
items.noTranslatePatterns: Amaphethini we-glob ahlukaniswe nomugqa omusha ahambisana nokhiye bezinga le-parser (indlela yamachashazi e-JSON, i-RESX {resxName}, i-PO {poMsgid}, iyunithi ye-XLIFF {xliffId}, ukhiye we-INI / restext). Okhiye abahambisanayo baphonswa esicelweni soMhumushi bese bedlula ngenani labo lomthombo lilondoloziwe.

items.summaryDetails: Isifinyezo se-Markdown esifanele umzimba we-PR noma isifinyezo somsebenzi.
items.hasNewTranslations: {trueString} lapho inguqulo eyodwa noma ngaphezulu entsha yakhiqizwa.

formats.title: Amafomethi wefayela
formats.lede: Amafomethi ayisithupha wezinsizakusebenza ezijikelezayo. Isenzo sifunda ifayela ngalinye lomthombo-wendawo, ihumusha amanani, futhi ibhale umfowabo ngendawo ngayinye ehlosiwe.
formats.namingConvention: Wonke amafayela asebenzisa isivumelwano {namingConvention} sokuqamba amagama.

resx.blurb: Amafayela wemithombo ye-.NET asuselwa ku-XML. Ukuhumusha umbhalo wangaphakathi we-node ngayinye ye-{dataValue}, ulondoloze amazwana nemethadatha.

xliff.blurb: Imibhalo ye-OASIS XLIFF 2.0. Humusha {source} ngalinye bese ubhala umphumela ku-{target} ohambisanayo, usetha {trgLang} yendawo.

po.blurb: Amafayela we-GNU gettext Into ephathekayo. Ukuhumusha {msgid} / {msgidPlural} ngalinye libe ngamafomu {msgstr} / {msgstrPlural}.

json.blurb: Amafayela we-JSON angakhethiwe. Izinto ezidlekeni zifakwe phansi nge-{delimiter} delimiter yokuhumusha, bese ziphinda zidleke ekukhiqizeni. Okhiye abanamachashazi ({dottedKey}) bagcinwa ngezwi.

ini.blurb: Amafayela {keyValue} alula (i-Win32-style INI noma iyiphi i-config eyisicaba). Izihloko zezigaba kanye nokuphawula kugcinwa.

restext.blurb: Imithombo yombhalo we-Microsoft MUI - ama-{keyValue} ayisicaba asetshenziswa njengomlingani wombhalo {resx}.

roundTrip.heading: Iziqinisekiso zohambo lokuya nokubuya
roundTrip.body: I-suite yokuhlola iqinisekisa i-byte-for-byte round-tripping yezinto ezimele zonke ifomethi. Uma i-quirk yefomethi iphula i-round-tripping ku-codebase yakho, sicela {issueLink} ngesampula encane.

recipes.title: Izindlela zokupheka
recipes.lede: Amaphethini ajwayelekile wokuhumusha kokuthumela: ama-monorepos, ama-glossaries, izigaba zangokwezifiso, ukugijima okomile, nokulawulwa kwethoni.

pullRequest.heading: Vula isicelo sokudonsa ngemuva kokugijima ngakunye

glossary.heading: I-Glossary yamagama emikhiqizo nemigomo yomkhiqizo
glossary.body: Amagama e-glossary asetshenziswa {after} ukuhumusha, ngakho-ke okukhiphayo okuhunyushwe ngomshini kugcina uphawu lwakho oluthandayo ngisho nalapho imodeli ishintshanisa isifaniso.

customCategory.heading: Isigaba Sokuhumusha Ngokwezifiso (imboni / isizinda)
customCategory.body: Qeqesha isigaba se-Azure {customTranslatorLink} ku-corpus ebamba isilulumagama sakho somkhakha kanye nethoni (yezomthetho, yezokwelapha, ukumaketha, ubunjiniyela bangaphakathi, njll) bese udlulisa i-ID yayo nge-{categoryId}. Lena ithoni enamandla kakhulu enikezwa yi-Azure.

tone.heading: Ukulawula ithoni + ukubuyela emuva okuqinile
tone.body: Hlanganisa i-{categoryId} yomhumushi wangokwezifiso ne-{profanityAction} ne-{allowFallbackFalse} ukuphoqelela izwi elingaguquguquki futhi wehluleke ukuhamba komsebenzi uma isigaba esikhethiwe singenakho ukuthunyelwa kwenye yezindawo zakho ezihlosiwe.

dryRun.heading: Ukugijima okomile ngaphambi kokuvula ukusebenza komsebenzi
dryRun.body: Isenzo sisakhipha imiphumela efingqiwe kanye nesifinyezo sesinyathelo kodwa awekho amafayela abhaliwe. Hlanganisa ne-{failOnErrorFalse} ukuveza yonke inkinga njengesixwayiso ngenkathi uphinda.

faq.title: Imibuzo
faq.lede: Izimpendulo ezisheshayo zemibuzo evelayo kaningi lapho uthatha isenzo.

azure.heading: Isenzo sikhuluma kanjani ne-Azure?
azure.body: Nge-SDK esemthethweni ye-Microsoft {azureSdkLink}, efakwe ku-{corePipelineLink}. Lokho kukuthola ukuzama kabusha okuzenzakalelayo ku-{statusCodes}, ukuthayipha isicelo namamodeli wempendulo, nokuphathwa kwekhanda lokuqinisekiswa mahhala - konke okwakuyikholi ye-{axios} esongwe ngesandla. Indawo yesenzo somphakathi (okokhiphayo, okukhiphayo, okukhiphayo kwefayela) ayishintshiwe.

tone.heading: Kungani ngezinye izikhathi izinguqulo zingekho emthethweni noma ezingekho emthethweni?
tone.body: Ukuhumusha komshini kuhluleka kumodeli ejwayelekile. Izinkinobho ezintathu ziyasiza: i-{glossaryLink} yesikhathi esinzima, i-{customTranslatorLink} yamamodeli ahleliwe aqeqeshwe ngethoni yakho nesilulumagama, kanye {profanityAction} ukuhlanza noma ukushaya amagama angcolile.

duplicateFiles.heading: Ngingakugwema kanjani ukuhumusha ifayela elifanayo kabili?
duplicateFiles.body: Vula ukuhamba komsebenzi kuma-{paths} ahambisana namafayela akho omthombo-wendawo kuphela, isib {sourceGlob}. Isenzo siphinde sifake isihlungi sayo sefayela le-per-trigger lapho {githubToken} isethiwe, ukunciphisa umsebenzi kumafayela ekuzibophezeleni kwakamuva.

offline.heading: Ngingakwazi yini ukwenza isenzo ngaphandle kwe-intanethi?
offline.body: Hhayi ncamashi — Umhumushi we-Azure AI ubuchopho besikhathi sokugijima. Kepha ungagijima ne-{dryRunTrue} ukuze uqinisekise i-parsing ne-config ngaphandle kokwenza izicelo ze-HTTP zokuhumusha.

node.heading: Iyiphi inguqulo ye-Node esenzweni esisebenza kuso?
node.body: I-v3 isebenza ku-GitHub Actions {nodeRuntime} runtime. I-JavaScript ehlanganisiwe iyahambisana ne-Node 20, 22, ne-24, okuyilokho okuvivinya i-CI.

dist.heading: Ivelaphi i-{distDir} ehlanganisiwe?
dist.body: Izenzo ze-GitHub JS zithumela i-JS yazo ehlanganisiwe endaweni yokugcina. Ukuhamba komsebenzi {distBuild} kuyakha kabusha ngemuva kokuhlanganiswa ngakunye kuya ku-{mainBranch} uma kuzokhuphuka, futhi {distCheck} kuvimbela ama-PR azothola okukhiphayo okuphelelwe yisikhathi.

formats.heading: Kuthiwani ngamanye amafomethi emithombo?
formats.body: Namuhla: {resx}, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini}, {restext}. {issueLink} uma udinga enye - isikhombimsebenzisi se-parser sincane (i-parse → imephu → usebenzise izinguqulo → ifomethi) futhi iminikelo yamukelekile.

translations.title: Ukuhumusha
translations.lede: Leli khasi lihunyushwa yi-Resource Translator uqobo, kuzo zonke izilimi ezisekelwayo, kuzo zonke izilimi ezisekelwa yi-Azure AI Translator.
translations.filterPlaceholder: Sesha ngolimi, ikhodi noma igama lendabuko.

steps.workflow: Pushes that touch it kick off {workflowLink}, which runs {thisAction} against itself.
steps.fanOut: Isenzo siphuma kuyo yonke indawo esekelwa yi-Azure AI Translator (elungiselelwe ngo-{configPath}) futhi ibhala umfowabo {messagesLocaleJson} ngenhloso ngayinye.
steps.pullRequest: Isicelo sokudonsa sivulwa ngezinguqulo ezintsha. Ukuyihlanganisa kushicilela kabusha leli khasi ngamakhadi agcwalisiwe.

translations.poweredBy: Inikwe amandla yi-Resource Translator ne-Azure AI Translator.

contributing.title: Ukunikela
contributing.lede: Imibiko ye-bug, izicelo zesici, nezicelo zokudonsa konke kwamukelekile. Isenzo sincane ngokwanele ukuba sibe nobungane kubanikeli besikhathi sokuqala.

steps.tests: Bhala ukuhlolwa kohambo lokuya nokubuya kwefomethi ye-parse → bese ufaka izinguqulo.

coverage.heading: Imikhawulo yokumboza
coverage.body: I-Jest config iphoqelela ukumbozwa okuncane. Ikhodi entsha kufanele igcine izitatimende + imigqa umkhawulo ngenhla 78% futhi imisebenzi ngaphezu 90%. Engeza ama-fixtures nezivivinyo eceleni kwenguquko yakho.

docsSite.heading: Isayithi lemibhalo
docsSite.body: Ifolda {docsDir} iphrojekthi ye-Astro 6 + Tailwind v4. Sebenzisa {npmInstall} lapho kanye, bese {npmRunDev} ukubuka kuqala kwendawo. Ukuhamba komsebenzi kwe-{pagesWorkflow} kuthumela amadokhumenti kumakhasi eGitHub kuwo wonke ama-merge.

changelog.title: I-Changelog
changelog.lede: Isifinyezo esiphezulu sokukhishwa. I-canonical, i-changelog enegunya ihlala CHANGELOG.md endaweni yokugcina.

releases.v302: {label} Izicelo Translator manje pin {apiVersion} on the wire for both {translate} and {languages}. I-Azure SDK ihlonipha kuphela inketho ye-api-version yezinga leklayenti lapho isitifiketi sidlulisiwe; isenzo siqinisekisa isicelo ngasinye ngezihloko, ngakho-ke leyo nketho yaphonswa buthule futhi izicelo zafakwa ku-API yokubuka kuqala inkontileka yayo {translate} yenqaba umzimba nge-HTTP 400 (ikhodi yephutha {code}). Qedela ukulungiswa kwaqala ku-3.0.1.
releases.v301: {label} Umzimba wesicelo se-{translate} manje useyi-JSON engenalutho yezinto {textItem} esikhundleni sento egoqiwe {inputs}, ehambisana nenkontileka ye-v3.0 REST. Ngokwayo lokhu akuzange kubuyisele izinguqulo — bheka 3.0.2.

items.multiVendor: {label} ukuhumusha nge-{azure}, {aws}, noma {google} ngemuva kwendawo eyodwa ye-API ebumbene. Khetha umhlinzeki oyedwa nge-run ngayinye ngokufakwa okusha kwe-{provider}; isenzo sidlulisela ku-SDK ehambisanayo ngemuva kwefektri futhi siziphatha ngendlela efanayo kungakhathalekile umthengisi. Ukuhambisana ngokuphelele emuva - {provider} okuzenzakalelayo ku-{azureValue}, ngakho-ke ukuhamba komsebenzi okukhona kwe-Azure kuyaqhubeka kusebenza kungashintshiwe.
items.aws: Umhlinzeki omusha we-AWS Translate ({awsSdk}). Qinisekisa nge-AWS ezenzakalelayo yokuqinisekisa uchungechunge (kunconyiwe: i-OIDC nge-{configureAwsCredentials}) noma i-{awsAccessKeyId} / {awsSecretAccessKey} ecacile; Isifunda nge-{awsRegion} noma {awsRegionEnv}.
items.google: Umhlinzeki omusha we-Google Cloud Translation ({googleSdk}, v2). Qinisekisa nge-akhawunti yesevisi ye-JSON credential ({googleCredentials}) noma ukhiye we-API ({googleApiKey}); {googleProjectId} yokuzikhethela.
items.intentMapping: {label} {textType} amamephu ku-{format} we-Google futhi {profanityAction} amamephu ku-AWS ukufihla lapho kukhona khona okulingana nakho. Izicacisi ze-Azure kuphela ({categoryId}, {apiVersion}, {profanityMarker}, {allowFallback}) azinakwa ngabanye abahlinzeki.
items.azureRelaxed: Okokufaka kwesicelo se-Azure ({subscriptionKey}, {endpoint}, {region}) akusekho kuphawulwe ukuthi kuyadingeka ku-{actionYml} ukuze abanye abahlinzeki bakhethwe - basaqinisekisiwe ngesikhathi sokusebenza lapho {provider} {azureValue}.
items.docs: Ikhasi labahlinzeki bokuhumusha abasha, amathebhu abahlinzeki ku-Qala, ukukhethwa kwabahlinzeki ekhasini le-Inputs, kanye nekhasi lasekhaya elivuselelekile elihola nge-Azure, i-AWS, ne-Google.

items.newInputs: Okokufaka okusha: {include}, {exclude}, {configPath}, {categoryId}, {apiVersion}, {dryRun}, {failOnError}, kanye nezinkinobho ezithuthukisiwe ze-Translator {textType}, {profanityAction}, {profanityMarker}, ne-{allowFallback}.
items.sourceLocale: Indawo yomthombo manje nayo idluliselwe kuMhumushi njengoba {fromLocale} ngakho-ke izintambo ezimfushane azitholakali ngokuzenzakalelayo.
items.resilience: {label} ukuzama kabusha okuzenzakalelayo kwezimpendulo zesikhashana ze-HTTP ({statusCodes}) ezihlonipha ikhanda le-{retryAfter} le-Azure - libuyela emuva emuva lapho lingekho. I-Tunable nge-{maxRetries} ne-{retryBackoffMs}. {issue}
items.placeholderProtection: {label} amathokheni afana ne-{mustache}, i-{jsVar}, i-{indexZero}, i-{numberFormat}, i-{printf}, i-{positionalPrintf} ne-HTML ihlanganiswe ngama-sentinels ngaphambi kokuhumusha futhi ibuyiselwe ngemuva kwalokho, ngakho-ke uMhumushi uyeka ukubamba i-i18next / Mustache / Handlebars / .NET / printf placeholders. Shintsha nge-{protectPlaceholders}; Ukwandisa {customPlaceholderPatterns}. {issue}
items.perKeyOptOut: {label} okufakwa okusha kwe-{noTranslatePatterns} kudonsa okhiye abahambisanayo kusuka esicelweni se-Translator ngokuphelele (kulondoloza amanani omthombo wamagama omkhiqizo, amakhodi wephutha, njll.). Ifanisa amaphethini we-glob ngokumelene nokhiye bezinga le-parser (indlela yamachashazi ye-JSON, i-RESX {resxName}, i-PO {poMsgid}, iyunithi ye-XLIFF {xliffId}, ukhiye we-INI / restext). {issue}
items.tooling: esbuild bundler, ESLint 9 flat config, Prettier, EditorConfig.
items.docsSite: I-Astro + Tailwind v4 docs site ngokubuka izinguquko kanye ne-Expressive Code.
items.docsAccessibility: {label} WCAG 2.1 AA pass. Ama-glyphs we-logo aguqulwe abe izindlela ukuze angabe esahluleka ukuqhathanisa umbala ngokumelene nezitobhi ze-gradient, inkinobho ye-{backToTop} entantayo isebenzisa i-{inert} ngenkathi ifihliwe (esikhundleni se-toggle ye-{ariaHidden} eshiye i-tabbable), {formatsAstro} izigaba azisashayisani nama-ID abo akhiqizwa ngokuzenzakalelayo, amakhadi amathathu endawo manje aveza izimfanelo ze-{lang} ze-BCP-47 ezivumelekile ({nya}, {lug}, {run}), amalebula aphindwe kabili {documentation} aphawulekayo ahlukaniswe phakathi kwebha eseceleni ne-footer,  futhi itafula ngalinye ledatha ku-{inputs} / {configuration} imikhumbi enesihloko se-screen-reader.
items.inlineCode: {label} docs prose {codeElement} manje igqoke ukugcizelela kwengqikithi efudumele / ye-amber - ehlukile kuphalethi ye→accent esetshenziselwa izixhumanisi nezihloko.
items.automation: Dependabot auto-merge, CodeQL scanning, CI matrix.
